name: banyan
description: Banyan — 基于 BanvasGL 的低代码可视化设计平台

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -c "cyan.bold,green.bold,yellow.bold" -n frontend,backend,electron "pnpm --filter banyan-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter banyan-backend dev" "pnpm --filter banyan-electron dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter banyan-frontend build && pnpm --filter banyan-backend build && pnpm --filter banyan-electron build
scripts.package: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter banyan-electron package
scripts.package:all: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter banyan-electron package:all
